content.title: Astro HR
content.short_description: A comprehensive HR onboarding and compensation management system built for Gigaclear
content.description: The GCMS is a comprehensive HR onboarding and compensation management system built for Gigaclear. It features a multi-step candidate starter form that guides new employees through onboarding process, including personal details, National Insurance information, health declarations, and other essential HR documentation. The system provides separate interfaces for candidates and HR staff, with robust authentication, form validation, and granular access control across 7 different user roles.
content.role: I was primary frontend developer responsible for building and maintaining the candidate onboarding experience and developed critical automation solutions. I developed the complete multi-step starter form system with 8+ steps including personal details, National Insurance, health declarations, and emergency contacts. I implemented comprehensive form validation using Formik and Yup, created reusable modal components for corrections and confirmations, and built progress tracking system. Most significantly, I engineered a sophisticated JavaScript automation script that solved a critical database authorization challenge - the system required manual database updates for each new input/output across 5 tables with 10,000+ rows total for 7 different roles. My AccessRights Query Generator automatically generates complete SQL scripts with 388+ UI items mapped to 67+ groups, handling 3 privilege levels (view, edit, hide) across 5 status levels, reducing what was hours of manual work to adding single configuration rows when new fields are added.

achievements: Successfully delivered a complete 8-step onboarding form used by all new Gigaclear employees
Created AccessRights automation script that reduced database management time by 98% and eliminated manual errors
Automated generation of 10,000+ SQL records across 5 tables with proper relationships
Resolved 50+ bug fixes and improvements, enhancing user experience and system reliability
Implemented robust form validation reducing data entry errors by an estimated 40%
Created reusable modal and form components that improved development efficiency
Established proper authentication flow ensuring secure access to sensitive HR data
Maintained code quality standards with ESLint, Prettier, and SonarQube compliance
technologies: React 18.2.0 with modern hooks and context API
Formik 2.2.9 with Yup for form validation
JavaScript automation scripting for SQL generation
Database schema design and access control management
Bootstrap and custom CSS for styling
Jest and React Testing Library for testing
Git version control with feature branch workflow

screenshots: Main candidate onboarding form interface showing progress steps
HR dashboard view for managing candidate submissions
Modal components for corrections and confirmations
Form validation error states and success notifications
Architecture diagram showing React component hierarchy
AccessRights automation workflow showing before/after database management
Database schema diagram showing Groups, Items, Roles, and AccessRights relationships
